dockerfile_lines: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libpango-1.0-0 libpangoft2-1.0-0 libharfbuzz-subset0 fonts-dejavu-core && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

project_research.description: Research a mining project via Exa, extract all fields, geocode, validate, then save to Supabase after human review.

analog_finder.description: Find 5-10 comparable projects from DB and Exa, score them for relevance, pause for human review, then save approved analogs.

report_generator.description: Build resource models using analogs and rules, pause for human model review, then generate the full MiningReport JSON and save to Supabase.

project_discovery.description: Scheduled background graph: discover new mining projects via Exa and save them as draft records in Supabase.

geocode_project.description: Lightweight geocoder: uses Exa Answer API to get GPS coordinates for a mining project, falls back to Nominatim, then saves lat/lng to Supabase.

pipeline_orchestrator.description: Master pipeline: chains project_research → analog_finder → report_generator via LangGraph Cloud API calls. Interrupts for human analog review between steps 2 and 3. Child graphs remain independently callable.

model_runner.description: Build Model 1 (+ Model 2 if official MRE exists) for a project that already has analogs. Persists each model to model_runs and overwrites the latest resource columns on projects. No PDF, no report row.

gold_model_builder.description: Outsource gold-project M&I / Inferred estimation to Parallel.ai's deep-research agent given full project + analog context. Single model, branches internally on use_mre flag (True = anchor on official MRE; False = blind pre-MRE prediction from drilling transformation). Persists to model_runs and updates latest projects.* fields.
